projects.title: 4-bit Nano Processor Implementation
projects.shortDescription: A modern, fully responsive portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, experience, and expertise in software development, hardware design, and supply chain management.
projects.description: A sleek, gradient-based portfolio website built with React and Vite featuring smooth animations, fully responsive design, and dynamic content management. Includes project showcase, skills section, certificates, volunteering experience, design gallery with 3D carousel, and contact section.
features: Modern design with gradient-based UI and smooth animations
Fully responsive - optimized for desktop, tablet, and mobile
Project showcase with GitHub links
Interactive 3D design gallery and carousel
Skills categorized by expertise area
Certificates and achievements display
Volunteer work and experience showcase
Smooth scroll animations and fade-in effects

projects.title: Student Task Management
projects.shortDescription: A full-stack application with Flutter client and Spring Boot backend featuring JWT authentication and role-based access control for Admin, Teacher, and Student users.
projects.description: A comprehensive task management system with Flutter mobile client and Spring Boot REST API. Implements JWT authentication with role-based access control, secure BCrypt password hashing, and PostgreSQL database with role segregation. Supports separate dashboards for Admin, Teacher, and Student roles.
features: JWT authentication with role-based access control (Admin, Teacher, Student)
Secure password hashing with BCrypt
Role-specific dashboards and navigation
Spring Boot REST API with security
PostgreSQL database with user roles

projects.title: Maze Solver Using Floodfill Algorithm
projects.shortDescription: A C++ implementation of maze-solving using the Floodfill (BFS) algorithm, simulating robot navigation with dynamic wall discovery and shortest path computation.
projects.description: An intelligent maze solver that simulates how a robot (micromouse) navigates through an 8x8 maze by discovering walls, updating its environment knowledge, and finding the shortest path to the goal. Uses Breadth-First Search (Floodfill) algorithm with dynamic pathfinding.
features: 8x8 maze representation with wall information per cell
Floodfill algorithm for distance calculation from goal
Dynamic wall discovery as the robot moves
Movement output with directions (F, L, R, B)
Shortest path computation and visualization
Hardcoded maze structure (easily modifiable)

projects.title: KandyPack Railway
projects.shortDescription: A rail and road-based supply chain distribution system for KandyPack FMCG manufacturer, replacing Excel-based logistics with a modern web platform.
projects.description: A comprehensive web-based logistics platform for coordinating orders, scheduling, inventory management, and role-based operations across rail and road distribution networks. Includes real-time-friendly architecture with role-based portals for admins, managers, warehouse teams, drivers, and customers.
features: Role-based portals (admin, manager, warehouse, driver, assistant, customer)
Order creation and tracking with supporting dashboards
Inventory and stock alert views for warehouse teams
Reporting and audit views for management
Real-time support with WebSocket architecture
REST API endpoints for all operations

projects.title: CineMatch AI 🎬
projects.shortDescription: A modern, responsive web application that provides personalized movie recommendations powered by artificial intelligence.
projects.description: A full-stack web application featuring an AI-Powered Discovery Engine for tailored movie recommendations. Includes smart search with debouncing, personalized local watchlists, and a sleek, dark-themed glassmorphism UI with custom Tailwind animations.
features: AI-Powered Discovery Engine for curated movie recommendations
Real-time, debounced smart search functionality
Personalized Watchlist saved locally
Sleek, dark-themed glassmorphism UI with custom animations
Fully responsive optimized for desktop and mobile
TMDB API integration for live movie data
